sessionStart.comment: Check environment and auto-launch Visual Studio with the D365 F&O solution

userPromptSubmitted.comment: Log user prompts for session audit trail

preToolUse.comment: Block dangerous operations before they execute

postToolUse.comment: After any build/rebuild tool, automatically read VS Output panes and report result

errorOccurred.comment: When an error occurs, capture VS Output error lines and feed back to Copilot for self-fix
